column1: 1 Circuity is from a sample of OD points with network distance matched to average commute distance
* Circuity is based on either 1995 or 2001 commute distance; 1990 commute distance not available
Network Speed (congested), Network Speed (freeflow), Population: TTI complete data 1982-2007 (calculated from 1990 values only)
Circuity: Networks are Census Tiger 2008 county-level shapefiles merged together, commute distances are from 1990 NPTS
Urbanized Area: Census 1990 Population and Housing Unit Counts (census.gov)
Employment: Census 1990, sum of responses to question P050. Travel Time to Work: Workers 16 years and over (American FactFinder)
